notes: Two-leg EURJPY/AUDJPY market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar (OOS net Sharpe 0.58 vs 0.8), but it is the strongest structurally interpretable unbuilt common-JPY pair with positive DEV and OOS Sharpe after QM5_12533/QM5_12532.
Q02 uses JPY tester currency and Deposit=15000000 so the framework 1pct fixed-risk cap preserves the JPY-equivalent RISK_FIXED=150000 budget used by the logical basket setfile.
